ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the ticket */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., Assigned, In Progress, Resolved) */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer who submitted the ticket */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the customer is located */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer service agent assigned to the ticket */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the ticket (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product related to the ticket */,
  "submit_date" TEXT /* Date and time the ticket was submitted */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the ticket was last modified */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who submitted the ticket */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date and time the ticket was resolved */,
  "satisfaction_rating" INTEGER /* Customer satisfaction rating */,
  "escalation_level" TEXT /* Escalation level of the ticket */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the ticket (e.g., email, phone, web form) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES customer_service_agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "support_hours" TEXT /* Support hours for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_service_agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the agent (e.g., Agent, Supervisor, Admin) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the agent is assigned to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the agent is assigned to */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Availability status of the agent (e.g., Available, Busy, Offline) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_service_agents_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_service_agents_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the product is associated with */,
  "support_contact" TEXT /* Contact for product-specific support */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Assigned, In Progress, Resolved) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "ticket_id" TEXT /* ID of the ticket the comment belongs to */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who added the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was added */,
  "resolution_suggestion" TEXT /* Suggestion for resolving the ticket */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the comment (e.g., Internal, Public) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_comments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_comments_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES customer_service_agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "ticket_id" TEXT /* ID of the ticket the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the file was uploaded */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the attachment */,
  "is_sensitive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attachment is sensitive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_attachments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_attachments_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer's company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Agent, Supervisor, Admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "ticket_id" TEXT /* ID of the ticket the history entry belongs to */,
  "field_changed" TEXT /* Name of the field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time the change was made */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who made the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_history_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES customer_service_agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_history_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)
